title: Repressive regulatory function of seryl-tRNA synthetase on VEGFA gene expression is impaired in renal cell carcinoma.
snippet: To assess the relationship of the mRNA and protein expression levels of seryl-tRNA synthetase (SerRS) and the expression of gene encoding vascular endothelial growth factor A (VEGFA) in patients with renal cell carcinoma (RCC). Expression levels of VEGFA and SerRS mRNA were quantified by quantitative real-time polymerase chain reaction in 31 paired RCC tumo...
